title: hedyotis depressa
intro: Hedyotis depressa, also known as Chinese chrysanthemum or Rugosa, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, thanks to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Hedyotis depressa is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal preparations.
